notes: The application formerly published as "Orrery" is now OPEN TRADING SURFACE ("OTS"). The prior name is trademarked by another party; this release removes it from the application, the documentation, the site, and the repositories. The rename is a bridge release engineered so no existing install is stranded: - The product: plugin id ots, display name Open Trading Surface, package ots-<version>.plugin, rebranded terminal, docs, and marks. The full name is used wherever space allows; OTS in tight spaces. - Your data migrates itself. On first run, state moves from the legacy ~/.orrery to ~/.ots by C
